displayTitle: Darth Vader: Dark Lord of the Sith 24: Fortress Vader Part VI
synopsis: "FORTRESS VADER" - PART 6 The FORTRESS will stand, but at a terrible cost. The fire will come to MUSTAFAR, and all will burn. The final design is revealed, woven from war, treachery and pain.
title: Darth Vader: Dark Lord of the Sith 24: Fortress Vader Part VI
